sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section I, List of Answers on Topics 28:1

items.sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section I, List of Answers on Topics 28:1
items.html: The restriction was not because of the disparity of form that appeared in the will to receive that wanted to correct it. It was only because of the embellishment, without any necessity and coercion.
